title: Mass and Speed Are Absolute
text: An object's mass and its speed do not change based on where we put $$h$$ $$=$$ $$0$$.

title: KE Depends Only on Speed
text: Since KE $$=$$ $$\frac{1}{2} m v^2$$, KE is also reference-independent.

title: PE Uses a Height Choice
text: Gravitational PE $$=$$ $$m g h$$ depends on where we choose $$h$$ $$=$$ $$0$$.
